description: Composition Pink round neck top made of 52% polyester and 48% cotton, sheer patterning in leopard print design all over, flowy short cap sleeves, graphic print on the front and tiered skirt detail at the bottom Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately in warm water (maximum 40 degrees) Use mild detergent Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print jealous 21 stays in-vogue with this stylish piece that is sure to become a love-forever favourite in your casual wardrobe. Wear it with form fitting denims and a blazer, style with understated accessories and peep-toe shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
